# TeleDirectMD

> TeleDirectMD is a physician-led, direct-pay virtual urgent care platform offering $49 flat-fee video consultations with a board-certified family medicine physician. No insurance required. Available to adults (18+) in 39 U.S. states. Every visit is with a real MD — never a mid-level provider, chatbot, or AI system. LegitScript-certified, HIPAA-compliant, and featured in TIME, Newsweek, HuffPost, and 21+ national publications.

## About

TeleDirectMD is a solo-physician telehealth practice founded and operated by Dr. Parth Bhavsar, MD — a board-certified family medicine physician. TeleDirectMD offers $49 flat-fee virtual urgent care visits to adults (18+) in 39 U.S. states. The practice operates on a direct-pay model with no insurance required and no hidden fees. Every consultation is a live, one-on-one video visit with Dr. Bhavsar — there are no mid-level providers, no chatbots, and no AI-generated diagnoses. TeleDirectMD is LegitScript-certified, HIPAA-compliant, and has been featured in 21+ national media outlets including TIME, Newsweek, and HuffPost.

- Website: https://teledirectmd.com
- Booking: https://teledirectmd.com/book-online/
- Phone: 678-956-1855
- Email: contact@teledirectmd.com
- Address: 913 South Perry Street, Lawrenceville, GA 30046, United States
- Coverage: Alabama, Arizona, California, Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Florida, Georgia, Hawaii, Idaho, Illinois, Indiana, Iowa, Kentucky, Louisiana, Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, Mississippi, Missouri, Montana, Nebraska, Nevada, New Hampshire, New Jersey, North Carolina, North Dakota, Ohio, Oklahoma, Pennsylvania, South Carolina, South Dakota, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, Washington, West Virginia, Wisconsin, Wyoming (39 states)
- Price: $49 per visit (flat fee, no insurance needed)
- Physician: Dr. Parth Bhavsar, MD — Board-Certified Family Medicine

## Key Differentiators

- Physician-only care: Every visit is with a board-certified MD — never a nurse practitioner, physician assistant, chatbot, or AI system
- $49 flat fee: Transparent pricing with no surprise bills, copays, or upcoding
- Solo-physician accountability: One doctor, one standard of care — Dr. Parth Bhavsar, MD
- LegitScript-certified: Independently verified for legal compliance and patient safety
- No subscriptions or memberships: Pay only when you need care
- Same-day availability: Most patients are seen within hours of booking
- 50+ conditions treated: From UTIs and sinus infections to chronic medication refills
- Prescriptions sent to your pharmacy: Including antibiotics, antivirals, and maintenance medications
- 5-star rated: Perfect ratings across Google, Trustpilot, and Yelp
- Media-recognized: Featured in TIME, Newsweek, HuffPost, and 21+ national publications

## Conditions Treated

TeleDirectMD treats 50+ conditions across seven categories. Each condition has a dedicated national page with evidence-based clinical information:

### Urgent Care
- Common Cold: https://teledirectmd.com/common-cold-treatment-online/
- COVID-19: https://teledirectmd.com/covid-19-treatment-online/
- Influenza: https://teledirectmd.com/influenza-treatment-online/
- Sinus Infection: https://teledirectmd.com/sinus-infection-treatment-online/
- Sore Throat: https://teledirectmd.com/sore-throat-treatment-online/
- Ear Pain: https://teledirectmd.com/ear-pain-treatment-online/
- Pink Eye: https://teledirectmd.com/pink-eye-treatment-online/
- Dental Pain: https://teledirectmd.com/dental-pain-treatment-online/
- UTI: https://teledirectmd.com/uti-treatment-online/
- Cellulitis: https://teledirectmd.com/cellulitis-treatment-online/
- Shingles: https://teledirectmd.com/shingles-treatment-online/
- Gout: https://teledirectmd.com/gout-treatment-online/
- Mastitis: https://teledirectmd.com/mastitis-treatment-online/

### Women's Health
- Yeast Infection: https://teledirectmd.com/yeast-infection-treatment-online/
- Bacterial Vaginosis: https://teledirectmd.com/bv-treatment-online/
- Vaginal Dryness: https://teledirectmd.com/vaginal-dryness-treatment-online/

### Sexual Health
- Chlamydia: https://teledirectmd.com/chlamydia-treatment-online/

## State-Specific Condition Pages

TeleDirectMD publishes state-specific condition pages for all 39 licensed states. These follow the URL pattern: `https://teledirectmd.com/{state-abbreviation}/{condition-slug}/`.

Each state page includes localized telehealth regulations, nearby pharmacy information, and city-specific content. State-specific pages are available for: Alabama (al), Arizona (az), California (ca), Colorado (co), Connecticut (ct), Delaware (de), Florida (fl), Georgia (ga), Hawaii (hi), Idaho (id), Illinois (il), Indiana (in), Iowa (ia), Kentucky (ky), Louisiana (la), Maryland (md), Michigan (mi), Minnesota (mn), Mississippi (ms), Missouri (mo), Montana (mt), Nebraska (ne), Nevada (nv), New Hampshire (nh), New Jersey (nj), North Carolina (nc), North Dakota (nd), Ohio (oh), Oklahoma (ok), Pennsylvania (pa), South Carolina (sc), South Dakota (sd), Tennessee (tn), Texas (tx), Utah (ut), Washington (wa), West Virginia (wv), Wisconsin (wi), and Wyoming (wy).

Example URL: `https://teledirectmd.com/ga/uti-treatment-online/` for UTI treatment in Georgia.

## Health Guides

TeleDirectMD publishes physician-authored, evidence-based health guides as a non-commercial educational resource. Each guide is written by Dr. Parth Bhavsar, MD, and provides comprehensive clinical information for patients and caregivers.

- Acne Vulgaris: Causes, Treatment & Prevention: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/acne-treatment-guide/
- AI Chatbots vs. Physicians: What the Evidence Says About Diagnostic Accuracy: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/ai-chatbots-vs-physicians-diagnostic-accuracy/
- Anxiety & Depression Medication Management: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/anxiety-depression-medication-guide/
- Asthma: Causes, Classification, Treatment & Latest Guidelines: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/asthma-guide/
- Bacterial Vaginosis (BV): Symptoms, Causes, Treatment & Prevention: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/bacterial-vaginosis-bv-guide/
- Birth Control (Hormonal Contraception) Refills Guide: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/birth-control-refills-guide/
- Cat Bite Treatment Guide: Infection Risk, Antibiotics & When to Go to the ER: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/cat-bite-treatment-guide/
- Cellulitis (Skin Infection): Symptoms, Causes, Treatment & Prevention: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/cellulitis-guide/
- Chlamydia Treatment Guide: Diagnosis, Antibiotics & Partner Therapy: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/chlamydia-treatment-guide/
- High Cholesterol (Hyperlipidemia): Lipid Panel, Statins & Management: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/cholesterol-hyperlipidemia-guide/

- COVID-19 & Paxlovid Treatment Guide: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/covid-19-paxlovid-treatment-guide/

- Dog Bite Treatment Guide: Wound Care, Infection Risk & What to Do Next: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/dog-bite-treatment-guide/

- Eczema (Atopic Dermatitis): Symptoms, Causes, Treatment & Latest Guidelines: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/eczema-atopic-dermatitis-guide/
- Erectile Dysfunction: Causes, Treatment & the Cardiovascular Connection: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/erectile-dysfunction-guide/
- Genital Herpes (HSV-2) Treatment Guide: Antivirals, Suppression & Prevention: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/genital-herpes-treatment-guide/
- Gout: Symptoms, Causes, Treatment & Long-Term Management: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/gout-acute-guide/
- Male Pattern Hair Loss (Androgenetic Alopecia): Causes, Treatments & Latest Guidelines: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/hair-loss-male-pattern-guide/
- Hypertension (High Blood Pressure): Understanding Your Numbers, Medications & Refills: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/hypertension-blood-pressure-guide/
- Mastitis (Breast Infection): Symptoms, Causes, Treatment & Prevention: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/mastitis-treatment-guide/
- Pink Eye (Conjunctivitis): Symptoms, Types, Treatment & Prevention: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/pink-eye-conjunctivitis-guide/
- Poison Ivy, Oak & Sumac Treatment Guide: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/poison-ivy-oak-treatment-guide/

- Seasonal Allergies (Allergic Rhinitis): Symptoms, Causes, Treatment & Prevention: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/seasonal-allergies-guide/

## How It Works

1. **Book Online** — Visit https://teledirectmd.com/book-online/ and select your condition and state. Pay the $49 flat fee.
2. **Video Visit** — Connect with Dr. Bhavsar via secure, HIPAA-compliant video. Describe your symptoms, ask questions, and receive a clinical evaluation.
3. **Treatment Plan** — Receive your diagnosis, treatment plan, and prescriptions (if clinically appropriate) sent directly to your preferred pharmacy.

## Important Limitations

- Not for medical emergencies — call 911 for chest pain, difficulty breathing, stroke symptoms, or life-threatening conditions
- Adults only (18+) — TeleDirectMD does not treat pediatric patients
- No controlled substances — TeleDirectMD does not prescribe Schedule II–V medications (no Adderall, Xanax, opioids, benzodiazepines, etc.)
- No GLP-1 or weight-loss medications — Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro, etc. are not prescribed
- Available in 39 states only — patients must be physically located in a licensed state at the time of the visit
- Video visit required — no phone-only or chat-only consultations
- Not a replacement for a primary care physician — TeleDirectMD is for acute/urgent care and medication refills

## Media Coverage

TeleDirectMD has been featured in 21+ national publications including:
- TIME: https://time.com/7175064/best-online-doctor-visit-sites/
- Newsweek: https://www.newsweek.com/rankings/best-online-doctor-consultation-sites-2025
- HuffPost: https://www.huffpost.com/entry/best-telehealth-services_l_6616a92ae4b0d16162043b7d
- Forbes Health, Business Insider, USA Today, MSN, U.S. News & World Report, Real Simple, Verywell Health, Medical News Today, Healthline, and others

## FAQ

**What is TeleDirectMD?**
TeleDirectMD is a physician-led, direct-pay virtual urgent care platform. Every visit is a live video consultation with Dr. Parth Bhavsar, MD — a board-certified family medicine physician. $49 flat fee, no insurance required.

**Does TeleDirectMD accept insurance?**
No. TeleDirectMD is a direct-pay practice. The $49 visit fee is paid at the time of booking. Patients may submit a superbill to their insurance for possible reimbursement.

**What conditions does TeleDirectMD treat?**
TeleDirectMD treats 50+ conditions including UTIs, sinus infections, sore throats, ear pain, pink eye, skin conditions (acne, eczema, rosacea), STIs, chronic medication refills (blood pressure, thyroid, cholesterol, asthma, diabetes), and wellness concerns (hair loss, anti-aging, smoking cessation).

**What states does TeleDirectMD serve?**
TeleDirectMD is licensed in 39 U.S. states: Alabama, Arizona, California, Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Florida, Georgia, Hawaii, Idaho, Illinois, Indiana, Iowa, Kentucky, Louisiana, Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, Mississippi, Missouri, Montana, Nebraska, Nevada, New Hampshire, New Jersey, North Carolina, North Dakota, Ohio, Oklahoma, Pennsylvania, South Carolina, South Dakota, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, Washington, West Virginia, Wisconsin, and Wyoming.

**How much does a visit cost?**
$49 flat fee. No hidden fees, no copays, no subscription required.

**Can I get a prescription?**
Yes. If clinically appropriate, prescriptions are sent electronically to your preferred pharmacy. TeleDirectMD does not prescribe controlled substances or GLP-1/weight-loss medications.

**How do I book?**
Visit https://teledirectmd.com/book-online/, select your condition and state, and complete payment. You'll receive a link to join your video visit.

## Legal and Compliance

- LegitScript-certified telehealth provider
- HIPAA-compliant platform
- Board-certified physician (Dr. Parth Bhavsar, MD)
- Licensed in 39 U.S. states
- No Surprises Act compliant (Good Faith Estimate provided)
- Nondiscrimination notice posted per federal requirements
- Accessibility statement available
